title: Revival Priest returns linked summoned creature when removed

card.rawText: Summon a creature from your cemetery to the field. If this card is removed from the field, send the creature back to the cemetery. If you have a creature on the field already, send it back to your hand.

plan.title: Revival Priest returns linked summoned creature when removed
plan.summary: Start with Revival Priest on the field anchoring a revived primary creature, invalidate/remove the source, and verify the linked primary returns to cemetery.

notes: Place Revival Priest in a field magic slot.
Put a creature in player_1 cemetery before cleanup.
Start with that creature as a primary summoned by and anchored to Revival Priest.

steps: Invalidate/remove Revival Priest as the source card.
Return the linked primary creature to cemetery.
Inspect player_1 field creatures and cemetery.
manualVerification: Confirm cleanup also happens when Revival Priest is destroyed from a Magic Slot.
riskNotes: This fixture covers the linked creature return path, not the initial summon prompt.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate linked primary cleanup when source leaves field.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
